goal: Generate and inspect the real data pipeline.
evidence_gates: data readiness audit has no missing files
schema profiles exist for every raw source
claim_discipline: Use minimal C1/C2 only for Section 2 motivation and robustness; do not treat them as real-run method-result gates.
Do not write SFT+GRPO coverage, dimension-level recovery, downstream utility, ablation, or semantic-space claims until the corresponding real C0-C14 evidence rows are safe_to_claim.
A BSC coverage change alone is metric evidence, not dimension-level recovery or judge-utility evidence.
exit_criteria: RubricBench/RewardBench/JudgeBench processed files exist and schema profiles are reviewed.

goal: Run offline diagnostics plus paper-facing ablations.
commands: run separately trained no_red, no_valid, no_verifier, and cov_only GRPO variants, then generate hard-gold BSC summaries under outputs/reward_component_training_ablation/{variant}/

for variant in no_red no_valid no_verifier cov_only; do python3 scripts/generate_model_rubrics.py --input data/processed/splits/rubricbench_gold_test_main.jsonl --providers configs/generators_reward_ablation.local.jsonl --output data/processed/reward_component_training_ablation/${variant}/model_rubrics.jsonl --data-source rubricbench --resume; done

for variant in no_red no_valid no_verifier cov_only; do python3 scripts/prepare_bsc_eval.py --gold data/processed/splits/rubricbench_gold_test_main.jsonl --predictions data/processed/reward_component_training_ablation/${variant}/model_rubrics.jsonl --output data/processed/reward_component_training_ablation/${variant}/bsc_eval.jsonl --report outputs/reward_component_training_ablation/${variant}/bsc_join_report.json --model ${variant} --data-source rubricbench --min-joined 100 && python3 scripts/bsc_diagnose.py --input data/processed/reward_component_training_ablation/${variant}/bsc_eval.jsonl --embedding-model BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 --coverage-tau 0.75 --redundancy-tau 0.85 --output-dir outputs/reward_component_training_ablation/${variant}/bsc; done
evidence_gates: C2/C3/C14 rows are present in the Evidence Matrix and determine whether any SFT+GRPO coverage-change claim is safe_to_claim
C4/C9/C10 downstream rows are present in the Evidence Matrix and determine whether any judge-utility claim is safe_to_claim
claim_discipline: Use minimal C1/C2 only for Section 2 motivation and robustness; do not treat them as real-run method-result gates.
Do not write SFT+GRPO coverage, dimension-level recovery, downstream utility, ablation, or semantic-space claims until the corresponding real C0-C14 evidence rows are safe_to_claim.
A BSC coverage change alone is metric evidence, not dimension-level recovery or judge-utility evidence.
exit_criteria: Main table, ablations, downstream summaries, and Evidence Matrix rows are exported with statuses; claims remain deferred unless the relevant rows are safe_to_claim.

goal: Build real Evidence Matrix and export paper artifacts.
commands: python3 scripts/export_paper_artifacts.py --main-table-csv outputs/matrix_real/main_table.csv --main-table-md outputs/matrix_real/main_table.md --downstream-table-csv RewardBench=outputs/matrix_real/main_table.csv --downstream-table-csv JudgeBench=outputs/matrix_judgebench/main_table.csv --downstream-table-csv RewardBench-2=outputs/matrix_rewardbench2/main_table.csv --ablation-csv outputs/bsc_ablation/ablation_summary.csv --teacher-union-csv outputs/teacher_union_ablation/teacher_union_ablation.csv --verifier-filter-csv outputs/verifier_filter_ablation/verifier_filter_ablation.csv --transition-summary-json outputs/matrix_real/dimension_transition/base_to_sft_only/transition_summary.json --transition-summary-json outputs/matrix_real/dimension_transition/base_to_sft_rl/transition_summary.json --semantic-space-dir outputs/matrix_real/semantic_space --audit-report outputs/matrix_real/audit_report.json --evidence-json outputs/evidence_real/evidence_matrix.json --evidence-csv outputs/evidence_real/evidence_matrix.csv --evidence-md outputs/evidence_real/evidence_matrix.md --output-dir outputs/paper_artifacts
evidence_gates: C2/C3/C14 rows are present in the Evidence Matrix and determine whether any SFT+GRPO coverage-change claim is safe_to_claim
